title: History Teacher / Coach
summary: Teach high school social studies (World History, U.S. History, Government, Economics) and serve in a coaching role for assigned UIL sport(s). Provide engaging, TEKS-aligned instruction and develop student-athletes through structured practice and positive leadership.
required_education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited university
required_credentials: Valid Texas teaching certificate in Social Studies 7-12 (or 8-12) for the subject assigned
Valid Texas commercial driver's license (CDL) with Passenger (P) and School Bus (S) endorsements for coaching, or willingness to obtain
preferred_experience: Coaching experience or participation in the sport assigned
responsibilities: Plan and deliver TEKS-aligned instruction in high school social studies courses.
Promote historical thinking, civic responsibility, and real-world connections.
Use data to guide instruction and provide interventions and enrichment.
Serve as a coach in one or more UIL sports; run practices and develop athletes.
Ensure compliance with UIL rules and district policies.
Drive a school bus to transport athletes to out-of-district competitions.
Maintain accurate records of student progress, grades, and attendance.
rubric_hints: Texas Social Studies 7-12 / 8-12 certification fit (hard requirement)
Coaching readiness: CDL (P/S) and AED certificate
